abhi-√vah (3. pl. -vahanti; Pot. 3. pl. -vaheyuḥ; aor. Subj. 2. sg. -vakṣi, 3. du. -vo|ām [ RV. viii, 32, 29  and 93, 24 ]) to convey or carry near to or towards,  RV. ;  ŚBr. ;  AitBr.  :
Caus. -vāhayati (incorrectly for ati-v˚), to pass (time),  Rājat.
